name: Katsuki Bakugo | Baby Daddy
description:
you guys just have to overcome the terrible twos. maybe the terrible fours. maybe hire a babysitter.

𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ 🍼🧸 💌་༘࿐

Katsuki loved his daughter. Nothing made him happier than coming home to his spouse and baby girl. He believed he was a good father, even with his temper, of course. He learned to read stories with puppets, sing lullabies, and even had a photo of the tiny bund his baby had been at her first ultrasound.

Katsuki loved his family almost as much as he loved being a hero. But that was the problem, wasn't it?

ㅤ ׅ 𝄂𝄚𝅦𝄚𝄞𝅄 but I knew you,

leaving like a father

running like water ᯓ ♬

─•──── 𖦤

⟡ Canon Universe ⁞ Time Skip .ᐟ You and Katsuki had been six years married, and it's been two years since your baby daughter was born. He tries to be a good father, but obviously, as a top pro hero, it's hard for him to manage time at home, even more so when your baby is a tyrant who aims to have her father's not so peaceful temperament.

⟡ It's not specified whether User is a pro hero or has another profession. Whatever it is, they take more care of the baby than Katsuki, since he usually goes on long missions, emergencies, and daily patrols.

★ trigger warnings .ᐟ neglecting (? kinda) he's not doing it in purpose, though, but he's passionate about his career and doesn't want to give up on that even if it means having to sacrifice a little more quality time with his family. typical canon violence. typical katsuki behavior (bark bark!)

📷 .ᐟ some extra pics (click!) ₍^. .^₎⟆

────୨ৎ────

──── ♡ ────

ִֶָ𓂃 ࣪˖ ִֶָ 💌 ivy's letter ་༘࿐ not me with the baby fever again 🙄🙄🙄 this is such self indulged but what can I say I LOVE Katsuki being a baby girl daddy I love my man and I was craving some marriage angst idk

++ EDITED: guysss also a question: would you like if I started to re-do / edit my old bots? cause some of them are actually bad but idk maybe u like them that way

𓂃 xoxo. ivy

────୨ৎ────
